summary: Verified LIVE URL (https://gaming-birthday-bash.preview.emergentagent.com/?v=nocache) is serving the LATEST build. Fresh browser context confirms light theme (rgb(245,245,245)), physics-hero with canvas present, H1 'LEVEL 10 UNLOCKED' in dark color (rgb(23,23,23)), RSVP form present WITHOUT any notes textarea, no 'Mission Notes' text in DOM. Screenshot visually confirms light background with green accents, wordmark plates (CALL OF DUTY, NEED FOR SPEED, DOOM visible), gamepad icons, and no crowded top-left corner.

verifications.body_bg_color: rgb(245, 245, 245) - LIGHT theme confirmed (not old dark rgb(10,10,10)/rgb(15,15,15))

action_items: No action required. Live URL is serving the CURRENT light-theme build. User's 'old site' complaint is client-side browser cache — advise user to hard-refresh (Ctrl+Shift+R) or open in incognito.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Live URL confirmed serving the latest light-theme build. Body bg = rgb(245,245,245), H1 dark, no notes textarea, physics-hero canvas present, wordmark plates rendered on canvas (DOOM/COD/NFS visible in screenshot). Reported cache-related complaint from user is not a code issue.
rca of the issue: User reported seeing 'the old one'. RCA: The deployed bundle at the preview URL IS the latest (light theme, no Mission Notes, ~8-body physics scene with wordmark plates). Fresh headless browser (no cache) rendered the correct latest UI. Root cause of user's complaint is client-side browser caching / stale service-worker / disk cache on their machine. Mitigation: user should hard-refresh with Ctrl+Shift+R, clear site data, or view in a private/incognito window. Appending ?v=nocache also bypasses caching, as demonstrated.
